dialogos.texto_en: (After the quintuplets\n rang the bell together in harmony,\n Raiha and I also rang it together...)
(We finished touring the Ocean Tower facilities\n and headed to the beach,\n where Nino wanted to see the Heart Rock.)
Wow! The ocean here is beautiful too!
The beach looks pristine. I imagine it'll be difficult to swim here.
Ah! There it is! That's the Heart Rock!
...That rock?
A heart...?
(Isn't that a tough one to call it a heart?)
Futaro-kun, did you just think about where the heart is?
Well, I guess.\nBut tourist spots often have some quirks,\nso I guess it's something like that.
You're not saying what you really think out loud.\nYou've grown up.
H-hmm?
Is that a heart...?
I guess you can't see it, huh.
W-well, yes.
Oh, it can't be helped.\nLet me show you.
Thank you so much, Nino-sensei!
There are actually three 'hearts' on Tinu Beach.
Three?
The first heart is the rock on the left\nwhen you look from the beach. The second one is\nmade by stacking two rocks together.
And, the third one is an upside-down heart\nthat you can see between the two rocks.\nTry moving around on the beach to see it.
Wow! It really looks like a heart!
Hey, no doubt.\nEspecially the third one.
I see.\nIt takes a little ingenuity.
I'm glad you're here, Nino-san.\nI was about to be disappointed and leave\nbecause I couldn't see it.
Yes, I'm grateful to you, Nino,\nfor investigating it thoroughly.
Teehee, you're welcome.
It's not just about enjoying the scenery.\nSeeing two things come together to form a heart\nreally gives you a feeling of being on a love island.
Yeah. Love is something that two people share.
(Love is something that two people share, eh.\n I don't really get that kind of thinking.)
(...It's strange, isn't it?\n That Nino and I are being so romantic like this.)
Hey, Futaro!
Y-yeah, what is it?
Let's take a picture!\nI've decided to take a picture with you here,\nand I even have a pose in mind, you know?
A pose?
You and I will make a heart mark together!\nWe'll make half a heart with our hands and overlay it\nwith the Heart Rock to take the picture.
No way!\nMaking a heart like that is too embarrassing!
Wha? Why not? It's normal for lovers.
Yeah, but...
I really want to take the photo.\nI won't move until you agree.
What? You're not a child.
It's your fault for making me do this.\nA photo isn't too bad, isn't it?\nLet me take a picture to capture the moment.
Okay, I understand.\nJust ONE photo then.
Alright, I'll take the photo!\nStand together, you two.
Futaro, come closer.\nWe have to make the heart shape.
Y-yeah...
Do we have to do this?\nI just don't like it.
It's not about whether you like it or not.\nI want to take a photo with you, Futaro.
We're on a trip,\nso I want to make lots of memories with you.
(Memories, eh...)
Okay, I got it.\nLet's take the photo.
Alright, I'll take the photo!\nStand together, you two.
Futaro, come closer.\nWe have to make the heart shape.
Y-yeah...
...Okay. Let's do it.
Really? It's okay?
To be honest, I don't think it suits me,\nbut if you want to do it, I'll go along with it.
Well...even if it's something like this,\nI'm still your boyfriend.
Thank you.
Big bro, you've grown up...!
Right?\nI didn't expect you to say yes so quickly.
Alright, I'll take the photo!\nStand together, you two.
Futaro, come closer.\nWe have to make the heart shape.
Y-yeah...
Uesugi-san, smile more!\nYou're looking so stiff, it's scary.
...Like this?
Yes, that's just barely okay.
I'd say it barely isn't.
To me, it's completely out.\nI can't see any smile on your face, Futaro-kun.
Doing any more to Uesugi-kun is cruel...
H-hurry up and take the picture!
Got it! Say cheese!
Let me see, let me see!
Here's how it turned out.\nHow is it?
Yeah, it's a great picture!\nThanks, Yotsuba. This will strenghten the bond\nbetween me and Futaro from here on out.
You did a great job, big bro.
...I feel like my soul has been taken.
What era are you from?
Anyway... I never thought\nyou would do something like this.
I wouldn't have done it if it wasn't for Nino's request!
And as expected, Futaro is unable to resist Nino.
Isn't it more like he's super sweet to Nino,\nrather than just weak.\nWe've been subjected to yet another lovey-dovey display.
Lovey-dov—?!
No, this isn't anything lovey-dovey!\nIt's just a simple fact, alrighty?!
You're not very convincing\neven if you deny it that strongly.
(Ugh, she's right. It's definitely lovey-dovey.\n I said it without even realizing it...!)
Hahaha. Big bro,\nyou really are Nino-san's boyfriend now.
...Don't say that, Raiha.\nI'm at my limit already...
